code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = io.read_line()
  let s = match line
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    ""
  end
  let parts = string.split_whitespace(s)
  mut total = 0
  mut i = 0
  mut stop = false
  while i < parts.len() and not stop
    let p = parts.get(i)
    match p
    when Some(tok)
      let v = match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(n)
        n
      when None
        0
      end
      if v < 0
        stop = true
      else
        total = total + v
      end
    when None
      stop = true
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println("partial=#{total}")
end
